meaning: n.荳肴歓辜溽噪莠ｺ,遖∵ｭ｢蜷ｸ辜溷媄霓ｦ霓ｦ蜴｢
examples: When I see some of her guests smoking in her house, as a nonsmoker, I feel unhappy.
This was strange, because my secretary was a nonsmoker.
Perhaps this was partly because he was a nonsmoker and a teetotaler.
Even nonsmoker Lizzie Middleton, a 65-year-old survivor of lung and colon cancer, agrees.
It is much better to be a nonsmoker who's a little bit fatter than a smoker who's a little bit thinner.
